name: Cereal Snack Meringues
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease a cookie sheet lightly.
3. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites until foamy.
4. Gradually add sugar and continue beating until very stiff and glossy.
5. Gently fold in the cereal and chocolate chips.
6. Drop mixture by teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 14 to 16 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Let cool on wire racks before storing in an airtight container.
